commandPalette.title: Command menu
commandPalette.description: Search for a page or a quick action

reports.title: Reports
reports.subtitle: Analytics and performance breakdowns across your pipeline.

empty.sourcesDesc: Lead source data will appear once leads are captured.
empty.regionalDesc: Regional breakdown appears once leads have city data.
empty.funnelDesc: Conversion funnel data will appear once leads move through stages.
empty.perfDesc: Rep performance data will appear once targets are set.

performance.title: Performance
performance.subtitleManager: Track target attainment for your team.
performance.emptyRepsDesc: Add reps to your team to see performance here.
performance.emptyDesc: Performance data will appear once targets are configured for this period.

palette.title: Jump anywhere with ⌘K
palette.body: Press Cmd/Ctrl+K on any page to search and jump to any screen, or run a quick action — no hunting through menus.

focus.title: A focused menu
focus.body: The sidebar shows your everyday hubs; the rest lives under "More". Hover any item and tap the star to pin your favourites to the top.

create.title: Create from anywhere
create.body: The "+ Create" button in the top bar starts a lead, task, opportunity or company from wherever you are.

modules.title: Turn features on or off
modules.body: Only need part of the platform? Go to Settings › Modules and switch off what you don't use — it disappears from the menu until you want it back.

accounts.title: Account Center
accounts.subtitle: Connect and manage every account in one place — publishing, inbox, WhatsApp and ads. One connection can power marketing and channels at once.
accounts.setUpChannelDesc: Enter the details below — this connects the channel to your inbox.

welcome.title: Welcome to Jeeta 🎉
welcome.subtitle: Your workspace is ready. Here are the fastest ways to get value in the first few minutes.

import.title: Import your contacts
import.desc: Bring your existing leads in so your pipeline isn't empty.

invite.title: Invite your team
invite.desc: Add teammates so work can be assigned and tracked.

modules.title: Choose your modules
modules.desc: Turn on only what you need — keep the console focused.

modules.title: Modules
modules.subtitle: Turn modules on or off to keep your console focused. Off modules disappear from the menu until you re-enable them.
modules.ownerOnly: Only the workspace owner can change which modules are active.
modules.emptyDesc: Your current plan has no toggleable modules.

validation.percentRange: Percent value must be between 1 and 100
validation.phoneInvalid: Please enter a valid phone number
validation.dateFuture: Date must be in the future
validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters

login.title: Marketing Panel
login.subtitle: Sign in to manage your leads
login.locked: Account locked. Try again in {{minutes}} minutes.
login.lockedTryLater: Your account is temporarily locked. Please try again shortly.
login.inactive: Your account is not active. Please contact your administrator.
login.failed: Could not sign in. Please try again.

hero.emptyDesc: Add a lead to begin building your pipeline — everything else follows from here.
hero.clear: You're all caught up — nice work.

distribution.title: Auto lead distribution
distribution.subtitle: How should new leads get dispatched automatically?

leads.title: Leads
leads.subtitle: Pipeline overview
leads.emptyUnassigned: No unassigned leads — everything is being followed up.
leads.emptyManager: No leads yet. Add one via "New Lead" up top, or wait for the AI Research routine to import some.

convertDialog.title: Convert to customer
convertDialog.description: Create a new tenant and admin user from this lead. This action cannot be undone.

createLead.subtitle: Capture a new sales opportunity
createLead.duplicateEmailError: A lead with this email already exists

orderForms.title: Order forms
orderForms.subtitle: Shareable links that sell a product and collect payment.
orderForms.empty: Create a shareable order form to sell a product online.
orderForms.needProduct: Create a product first — order forms sell a product.
orderForms.name: Name

subscriptions.title: Subscriptions
subscriptions.subtitle: Recurring plans that auto-generate invoices each period.
subscriptions.empty: Create a recurring plan to auto-bill a customer each period.
subscriptions.name: Name

products.title: Products
products.subtitle: Reusable priced items you sell.
products.empty: Create products to reuse on invoices and deals.
products.name: Name

documents.title: Documents
documents.subtitle: Agreements you send for e-signature.
documents.empty: Draft an agreement and send it for e-signature.
documents.bodyPlaceholder: The full text of the agreement…

estimates.title: Estimates
estimates.subtitle: Quotes you send to customers.
estimates.empty: Create a quote and send it to a customer.
estimates.readonlyNote: A sent estimate is read-only. Use the actions on the list.

opportunities.title: Opportunities
opportunities.subtitle: Track deals across your sales pipelines.
opportunities.winError: Could not mark the deal as won
opportunities.loseError: Could not mark the deal as lost
opportunities.name: Name
opportunities.pipelinesSubtitle: Define the stages deals move through.
opportunities.pipelineDeleteError: Pipeline has open deals — move them first
opportunities.stageDeleteError: Stage in use or last stage — cannot delete

tasks.title: Tasks
tasks.subtitle: Follow-ups and reminders
tasks.deleteDesc: This task will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.
tasks.emptyHint: Create a follow-up so leads don't go cold.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.subtitle: Plan your week
calendar.noTasksThisDay: No tasks scheduled for this day.

commissions.title: Commissions
commissions.subtitle: Earnings and payouts
commissions.approveError: Couldn't approve — amount must be non-zero

customObjects.title: Custom Objects
customObjects.subtitle: Define your own record types beyond Contacts — properties, vehicles, policies, anything.

empty.title: No custom objects yet
empty.description: Create your first custom object to model records specific to your business.

form.subtitle: Define a record type for your workspace (e.g. Property, Vehicle, Policy).
form.primaryFieldHint: Which field key is the record’s display name (default "name").

record.subtitle: Fill in the fields for this record.
record.emptyNoFields: Add fields to this object first, then create records.
record.noFieldsHint: Add fields to this object before creating records.

field.label: Label
field.emptyHint: Add fields to describe this object’s records.

confirm.archiveBody: The object is hidden from the list. Its records are kept and can be restored later.
confirm.deleteRecordBody: This permanently deletes the record and its contact links.
confirm.archiveFieldBody: The field is hidden from new records. Existing values are kept.

ads.title: Ads
ads.subtitle: Track Meta and TikTok ad performance, manage campaigns and auto-scale.

byDay.title: Daily breakdown
byDay.empty: No metrics in this range yet.

empty.title: No ad accounts connected
empty.description: Connect a Meta or TikTok ad account to start seeing spend and conversion reporting.

accounts.emptyHint: Connect a Meta or TikTok ad account to pull spend and conversion metrics.

confirm.disconnectBody: This removes the account and all of its pulled metrics. This cannot be undone.

connect.title: Connect ad account
connect.subtitle: Link your Meta or TikTok ad account to pull spend and conversion metrics.
connect.noSecretBox: Token encryption is not configured on the server (MARKETING_SECRET_KEY). Accounts cannot be connected until an administrator enables it.
connect.providerUnavailable: This provider is not configured on the platform yet. Connecting it will not pull data until an administrator enables its app credentials.
connect.metaIdHint: Your Meta ad account id (act_… or the number).
connect.displayNameHint: Optional — defaults to the account id.
connect.currencyHint: Optional — the account currency (e.g. USD, TRY).
connect.accessTokenHint: Stored encrypted — it is never shown again after saving.

oauth.tiktokNotConfigured: An admin must add TikTok Business app credentials first
oauth.selectBody: Select the advertiser accounts to connect to this workspace.
oauth.noAdvertisersHint: Make sure you granted access to at least one TikTok advertiser account.
oauth.callbackError: TikTok connection failed or was cancelled. Please try again.
oauth.startFailed: Could not start the TikTok connection

register.title: Create your workspace
register.subtitle: Your team, your leads, your research — in one place.
register.passwordHint: Min 8 characters, at least one letter and one digit.

research.title: AI Research
research.subtitle: Tell the nightly research agent who to find — it fills your pipeline up to your daily quota.
research.quotaHint: Resets at midnight UTC. Upgrade your package to raise the daily limit.
research.name: Profile name
research.icp: Who should the agent find? (ideal customer + pain signals)
research.icpPlaceholder: e.g. Independent cafes and small restaurant groups (1-5 branches) showing slow-service complaints in recent reviews, active on Instagram but with no online ordering link…
research.icpMin: min 40 characters — specific briefs get better leads
research.pitchPlaceholder: How should the opener position your product for these leads?
research.exclusionsPlaceholder: e.g. no franchises, skip hotel restaurants
research.empty: No research profiles yet — create one and the nightly agent starts hunting.
research.tokensHint: For pushing leads from your own integrations (POST /api/marketing/leads/ingest with the x-ingest-token header). The platform research agent does not need one.
research.tokenOnce: Copy this token now — it will never be shown again.

billing.title: Billing & Packages
billing.subtitle: Your plan decides how many leads the research agent delivers every day.
billing.noProviders: No payment method is configured — contact support
billing.bankHint: Include the reference in the transfer description — your package activates as soon as our team matches the payment.
billing.aiCreditsHint: Resets monthly. Add a boost below to raise the cap.

referral.noCode: You don't have a referral code yet. Ask your manager to allocate one.
referral.hint: You earn commission on subscription sales made with this link/code (first sale + renewals + upgrades).
referral.regenerateConfirm: The old code will stop working and shared links will break. Continue?

agents.title: Agent Studio
agents.subtitle: Define the persona, tone and grounding your AI uses to answer customers. Connect channels in the next step.
agents.name: Agent name
agents.personaPlaceholder: e.g. You are the friendly front-desk assistant for a family pizzeria. Greet warmly, answer in short sentences…
agents.goalsPlaceholder: What should the agent try to achieve? e.g. book a table, capture phone + party size
agents.guardrailsPlaceholder: What must it never do? e.g. never quote prices, never promise refunds
agents.noDocs: No knowledge docs yet — add some in the Knowledge Base to ground replies in facts.
agents.empty: No agents yet — create one to define how your AI talks to customers.

knowledge.title: Knowledge Base
knowledge.subtitle: The facts your AI answers from — menus, hours, policies, FAQs. Attach docs to an agent in Agent Studio.
knowledge.contentPlaceholder: Paste the facts the AI should know. Plain text works best.
knowledge.empty: No documents yet — add the facts your AI should answer from.

inbox.selectPrompt: Select a conversation to view the thread.
inbox.replyPlaceholder: Type a reply… (this pauses the AI)
inbox.title: Inbox
inbox.subtitle: Every customer conversation in one place.
inbox.emptyHint: Conversations appear here once a channel is connected and customers message you.

channels.title: Channels
channels.subtitle: Connect where your customers message you — web chat, WhatsApp, SMS, Instagram, Messenger. Pick which AI agent answers on each.
channels.metaConnectHint: An admin must add the Meta (Facebook) app credentials first
channels.name: Name
channels.webchatHint: No credentials needed — a public embed snippet is generated after you save.
channels.empty: No channels yet — connect one so customers can message you.

automations.title: Automations
automations.subtitle: When something happens, do this. Triggers fire steps — send, wait, branch, create tasks, update leads.
automations.aiAssist: Describe it — AI drafts the steps
automations.aiPlaceholder: e.g. when a new lead comes in, wait 1 hour then send a WhatsApp intro and create a follow-up task
automations.name: Name
automations.badFilters: Trigger filters are not valid JSON
automations.empty: No automations yet — describe one and let AI draft it.
automations.enrollHint: Add every contact matching this filter into “{{name}}”.
automations.enrollAll: Enroll ALL contacts — this starts sending messages and cannot be undone
automations.templatesHint: Pick a recipe to pre-fill the builder — you can tweak everything before saving.
automations.aiDialogHint: AI drafts the trigger and steps — you review and save them in the builder.
automations.canvasHint: Click a step to edit it, or use the palette to add one.
automations.jsonNeedsType: Must be a JSON object with a "type" field.
automations.invalidFiltersJson: Filters must be a JSON array.
automations.subject: Subject
automations.branchHint: Continue when ALL conditions match; otherwise fall through (or jump).
automations.elseGoto: If no match — go to step # (optional)
automations.updateLeadHint: Set these fields on the lead.
automations.routes: Route each category to a step # (optional)

campaigns.title: Campaigns
campaigns.subtitle: Blast email, SMS or WhatsApp to a filtered slice of your leads. Opt-outs and an unsubscribe link are handled for you.
campaigns.name: Name
campaigns.audience: Audience (leads matching all rules; empty = everyone opted-in)
campaigns.aiGoal: Goal — e.g. announce a 20% spring discount
campaigns.subject: Subject
campaigns.empty: No campaigns yet — create one and let AI write the copy.

sites.title: Funnels & Pages
sites.subtitle: Build landing pages with lead-capture forms. Describe one and AI drafts the blocks.
sites.aiPlaceholder: Describe the page — e.g. a demo-booking page for a coffee POS
sites.empty: No pages yet — describe one and let AI draft it.
sites.noForms: No forms yet. Add one, then reference it in a page form block: {"type":"form","formId":"…"}.

booking.title: Booking
booking.subtitle: Let leads book a slot. Availability windows are in UTC for now.
booking.typeHint: How bookings are distributed across your team.
booking.capacityHint: Max attendees for a group/class slot.
booking.membersRoundRobin: Bookings are distributed one-by-one across these members.
booking.membersCollective: All these members are booked together for each slot.
booking.name: Name
booking.empty: No calendars yet — create one to let leads book time.
booking.conferencingHint: Attach a Meet/Teams link to each booking.

reviews.title: Reviews
reviews.subtitle: Send review requests via automations; happy customers (≥4★) go to your public page, unhappy ones reach you privately first.
reviews.empty: No reviews yet — add a source and send review requests from an automation.

askAi.title: Ask AI
askAi.intro: Ask about your leads, tasks and campaigns in plain language.
askAi.locked: Ask AI is not in your plan — upgrade to enable it.
askAi.ex1: How many leads are in each status?
askAi.ex2: Which leads in Istanbul are still NEW?
askAi.ex3: What's the status of my campaigns?

voice.title: Voice AI
voice.subtitle: AI answers your phone (Twilio), grounded on an agent + your knowledge base. Configure the number under Channels (type VOICE).
voice.selectPrompt: Select a call to see the transcript.

callAnalysis.title: Call analysis
callAnalysis.recordingRequired: A call recording is required to analyse

voiceAiSettings.title: Voice AI
voiceAiSettings.subtitle: Voice-AI capabilities activate automatically once you buy the NetGSM add-ons and set the keys. Each capability's status and wiring URLs are shown below.

stt.name: Speech-to-Text (STT)
stt.note: Needed to analyse call recordings. To enable: NetGSM Call Recording + an STT key.

bridge.name: AI Bridge
bridge.note: Lets VAPI/Retell/ElevenLabs use our Claude brain for real-time voice AI. To enable: SIP Trunk + Yapay Zeka + a partner.

netgsmIvr.name: NetGSM IVR
netgsmIvr.note: Uses NetGSM's TTS robot for inbound calls. To enable: NetGSM Custom API (Özel API) add-on.

copilot.name: Live Assistant (Copilot)
copilot.note: Suggests lines to the rep during a call. To enable: STT/key only.

invoices.title: Invoices
invoices.subtitle: Bill your customers and collect via your own Stripe or bank transfer.

branding.title: Branding
branding.subtitle: Your brand on the customer-facing surfaces — funnel pages and the web-chat widget.
branding.logoHint: PNG, JPEG or WEBP, under 1 MB.
branding.preview: This is how your brand appears on public pages and the chat widget.

onboarding.title: Get set up
onboarding.subtitle: A few steps to get your workspace working for you.

agent.title: Create your first AI agent
agent.desc: Define how your AI greets and answers customers.

knowledge.title: Add knowledge
knowledge.desc: Give the AI your menu, hours and policies to answer from.

channel.title: Connect a channel
channel.desc: Web chat, WhatsApp or SMS — where customers message you.

leads.title: Add your first lead
leads.desc: Import or create a lead to start your pipeline.

team.title: Invite your team
team.desc: Add teammates so leads can be assigned and worked.

site.title: Publish a landing page
site.desc: Capture leads with an AI-drafted funnel page.

needsAttention.title: Needs attention
needsAttention.subtitle: Items waiting on you right now.

cf.title: Custom fields
cf.subtitle: Define workspace-specific data captured on every lead.
cf.dialogDesc: Custom fields capture workspace-specific data on every lead.
cf.label: Label
cf.keyHint: Optional. Defaults to a slug of the label. lower_snake_case.
cf.keyImmutable: The key is immutable once created.
cf.typeImmutable: The type is immutable once created.
cf.requiredHint: Enforced when a lead is created.
cf.archiveDesc: The field is hidden from new leads but existing values are preserved. You can restore it later.
cf.emptyHint: Create your first custom field to capture extra data on leads.

validation.optionsRequired: At least one option is required

tags.title: Tags
tags.subtitle: Label leads and build segments from tag membership.
tags.dialogDesc: Tags let you label and segment leads.
tags.name: Name
tags.emptyHint: Create a tag to start labelling leads.
tags.deleteDesc: This removes the tag from all leads. This action cannot be undone.

validation.colorHex: Must be a hex colour like #6366f1

seg.title: Segments
seg.subtitle: Saved, live filters over your leads.
seg.dialogDesc: Segments are saved, live filters over your leads.
seg.name: Name
seg.jsonHint: Escape hatch for advanced predicates. Shape: { op, children } or { field, cmp, value }.
seg.noRules: No rules — this matches every lead.
seg.noMatches: No leads match this segment yet.
seg.emptyHint: Build a segment to group leads by field, tag, or custom-field values.
seg.deleteDesc: This permanently deletes the segment definition.

aiStudio.title: AI Content Studio
aiStudio.subtitle: Generate images and video for your social posts.
aiStudio.promptPlaceholder: Describe the image or video to generate…

empty.title: No assets yet
empty.desc: Generate your first image or video above.

brandKit.title: Brand Kit
brandKit.subtitle: Logo, palette, tone and references reused across AI generations.
brandKit.identityDesc: Used to keep generated content on-brand.

composer.subtitle: Compose once and publish across your connected networks.
composer.contentPlaceholder: What do you want to share?
composer.noMedia: No media. Upload up to 10 images/videos, or paste public URLs.
composer.noAccountsHint: Connect a social account first to choose where to publish.
composer.formatHint: Reels and Stories need a video (Stories also accept an image).
composer.scheduleHint: Leave empty to keep as draft; the post publishes at this time when set.
composer.linkedinVisibilityHint: Controls who can see this post on LinkedIn.

social.title: Social Planner
social.subtitle: Compose, schedule and publish posts across your social networks.

empty.title: No posts yet
empty.connectFirst: Connect a social account, then compose your first post.

accounts.emptyHint: Connect a Facebook, Instagram or LinkedIn account to start publishing.

confirm.publish: This publishes the post to all its pending targets immediately.
confirm.deleteBody: This permanently removes the post and its targets. This cannot be undone.
confirm.disconnectBody: The planner will no longer be able to publish to this account.

oauth.callbackError: Connection failed or was cancelled. Please try again.

socialCampaign.title: Social Campaigns
socialCampaign.subtitle: AI-planned social content calendars
socialCampaign.newSubtitle: AI plans and progresses your content.
socialCampaign.emptyBody: Create a campaign to let AI plan and publish your social content.

mock.row1Msg: Can I get your price list?
mock.row2Msg: Are you available for a meeting?
mock.bubble1: Hi, can I get your price list?
mock.bubble2: Of course! Sending it right now 📄

hero.subtitle: From lead to sale, campaign to automation, inbox to analytics — Jeeta runs your whole growth engine in one place.
hero.audience: Built for SMBs, sales teams & agencies.
hero.trust: No credit card · Set up in minutes · GDPR/KVKK compliant

features.title: Everything you need to grow
features.subtitle: One platform that talks to itself — instead of a dozen disconnected tools.
features.crmDesc: Leads, contacts, companies and pipelines; model your own data with custom fields and objects.
features.inboxDesc: WhatsApp, Instagram, web-chat and email in one inbox — reply as a team from a single place.
features.campaignsDesc: Email, SMS and WhatsApp campaigns — segment, send, and track opens and clicks.
features.automationDesc: Automate follow-ups, assignments and messages with a drag-and-drop flow builder.
features.funnelsDesc: Funnels, landing pages, forms and online booking — live without writing code.
features.socialDesc: Schedule, publish and measure posts across Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn and TikTok.
features.voiceDesc: Calls, power dialer, IVR and an AI receptionist — over a real business line.
features.billingDesc: Estimates, invoices, subscriptions and products — collect payments online.

trust.title: Trust built in, from day one
trust.complianceDesc: Consent, data-subject and compliance tooling built in.
trust.authDesc: Two-factor auth and granular role-based access control.
trust.encryptionDesc: Your data is encrypted at rest and in transit.
trust.auditDesc: See who did what, with full workspace controls.

how.title: Get started in three steps
how.subtitle: Setup takes minutes — no technical team required.
how.step1Desc: Create your workspace in seconds and invite your team.
how.step2Desc: WhatsApp, social accounts, phone and payments — connect in a few clicks.
how.step3Desc: Scale your sales with automation, campaigns and analytics.

highlights.inboxDesc: Whether a customer messages on WhatsApp, comments on Instagram or starts a chat on your site — it all lands in the same inbox. Your team replies from one place without losing context.
highlights.autoDesc: When a new lead arrives, send a welcome message, create a task, tag it and route it to the right rep — automatically. The drag-and-drop builder takes minutes to set up.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: Any business that captures leads and talks to customers across channels: SMBs, sales teams, agencies and service providers.
faq.a2: Minutes. Create your workspace, connect your channels and start right away — no setup fee or technical team needed.
faq.a3: Yes. Every workspace is isolated, GDPR/KVKK compliant, with two-factor authentication (2FA) and role-based access.
faq.q4: Can I connect WhatsApp and my social accounts?
faq.a4: Yes. Connect WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn and TikTok with one-click secure OAuth.
faq.a5: Yes. Create your workspace for free and explore the platform; upgrade your plan from the dashboard whenever you want.

finalCta.title: Start with Jeeta today
finalCta.subtitle: Bring all your marketing into one panel. No credit card required.

footer.tagline: The all-in-one marketing and CRM platform.

appointments.newDesc: Book a slot on one of your calendars. The time must be within its availability.
appointments.createFailed: Could not book — check the time is within the calendar's availability
appointments.title: Appointments
appointments.subtitle: Booked appointments across your calendars. Reschedule, confirm, or mark outcomes.
appointments.emptyDesc: Booked appointments will show up here.
appointments.cancelDesc: The attendee will lose this slot and any meeting link.
appointments.rescheduleDesc: Pick a new time. The backend re-validates availability, notice and buffers.

publicBooking.title: Book a time
publicBooking.emailed: A confirmation with a calendar invite has been sent.
publicBooking.noSlots: No available times in the next two weeks.
publicBooking.name: Your name
publicBooking.failed: Could not reserve that slot. Please pick another.
